stemHtml: Which statement regarding the influence of a runway down-slope is correct for a balanced take-off? Down-slope…

options.a: reduces V<sub>1</sub> and reduces take-off distance required (TODR).
options.b: increases V<sub>1</sub> and reduces the accelerate stop distance required (ASDR).
options.c: increases V<sub>1</sub> and increases the take-off distance required (TODR).
options.d: reduces V<sub>1</sub> and increases the accelerate stop distance required (ASDR).
